adminReports.reportLedgerDesc: Complete ledger of all deposits, bid locks, refunds, and withdrawals.
adminReports.reportDisputeDesc: Active disputes, median resolution time, and arbitration outcomes.

kyc.pageSubtitle: Submit your national ID (CCCD/CMND) to unlock bidding on BidZone.
kyc.signedOutTitle: Sign in to verify your identity
kyc.signedOutDesc: KYC submissions are tied to your account so staff can review them safely.
kyc.verified: Your identity is verified. You can participate in any active auction.
kyc.rejectedHelp: Please review the feedback and resubmit below.
kyc.infoRequiredHelp: Please review the note and resubmit your profile below.
kyc.pendingSubmittedOn: Submitted on {date}. You can resubmit if you need to update anything.
kyc.sectionReviewHint: AI extracted this from your ID card. Please verify and correct if needed before submitting.
kyc.ocrFlowHint: Step 1: Upload clear front and back photos of your ID card. AI will auto-fill the fields below.
kyc.ocrScanning: AI is reading your ID card...

errors.missingPhotos: Please upload all three ID photos (front, back, selfie).
errors.ocrNeedBothSides: Please upload front and back ID photos before scanning.
errors.submitNeedThreePhotos: Please upload all three photos (front, back, selfie) before submitting.
errors.ocrFailed: Could not read ID card. Try clearer photos or fill in manually.
errors.ocrBusy: OCR is busy (Gemini rate limit). You can fill in manually or try again in about a minute.
errors.invalidImageType: Only JPEG or PNG images are accepted.
errors.imageTooLarge: Each KYC photo must be 8 MB or smaller.
errors.contractConfirmedPending: Agreement confirmed. It will be saved when you submit KYC.
errors.contractConfirmedOnSubmit: Confirmed — contract will be saved on KYC submit
errors.duplicateCccd: This ID number is already registered. Please sign in with the correct account or contact support.
errors.submitted: KYC submitted. We will notify you once staff review it.

sellerContract.title: Platform agreement for sellers
sellerContract.subtitle: Only Seller accounts must sign. The agreement takes effect after staff/admin approves your KYC.
sellerContract.term1: 1. The seller agrees to list and sell products on the auction platform.
sellerContract.term2: 2. Platform service fee is 20% of the winning bid; 80% is paid to the seller.
sellerContract.term3: 3. The seller is responsible for declaring and paying personal income tax.
sellerContract.term4: 4. The seller confirms KYC information is accurate and products are legal.
sellerContract.term5: 5. The agreement takes effect after signing and successful KYC approval by staff/admin.
sellerContract.agreeLabel: I have read, understood and agree to the platform seller agreement terms.
sellerContract.signHint: You must click Sign before submitting verification.
sellerContract.signed: You have signed the electronic agreement.
sellerContract.agreeRequired: Please agree to the terms before signing.
sellerContract.signBeforeSubmit: Please sign the electronic agreement before submitting verification.
sellerContract.signSuccess: Agreement signed. You can now submit KYC for staff review.
sellerContract.signFailed: Could not sign the agreement. Please try again.

becomeSeller.pageSubtitle: Sign the platform agreement electronically to list and auction items on LuxeAuction.
becomeSeller.footerNote: Complete KYC first, then acknowledge the contract and submit seller registration to list items.

becomeSeller.adminNoNeed: Admin accounts can already post items — no seller contract required.

becomeSeller.kycRequiredBeforeSubmit: Complete identity verification (approved KYC) before submitting seller registration.

sell.pageSubtitle: Enter lot details, upload high-res images and request AI valuation.
sell.kycRequiredDesc: To protect buyers, BidZone requires every seller to complete identity verification (KYC) before posting an item. Please double-check your personal info matches your CCCD, then submit a KYC submission.
sell.signInRequiredDesc: Please sign in as a seller to post new items.
sell.sellerRequiredDesc: Posting new items is only available for seller accounts.
sell.submittedDesc: Your listing is awaiting review. An admin will verify it and schedule the auction before it goes live. You will be notified when approved.
sell.lotDescriptionPlaceholder: Provide a detailed description of the item and its current condition...
sell.clickOrDragImages: Click or drag multiple images to upload
sell.supportFormats: Support for JPG, PNG, WEBP (Max 20MB per file)
sell.maxImagesReached: Maximum {max} images reached. Remove one to replace.
sell.scheduleByAdminNote: The auction schedule is set by an admin after your listing is approved. You will receive a notification with the go-live time.
sell.auctionScheduleDesc: Choose when this item will go live. Staff will review your schedule before approving the listing. Start time must be at least {minutes} minutes from now.
sell.termsAgree: By submitting, you agree to BidZone's Consignment Terms & Conditions.
sell.aiValuationDesc: Add a description and photos, then ask the chatbot or tap Value from form for a VND market estimate.
sell.aiChatWelcome: Hi! I can estimate market value in VND from your description and photos. Use the attach button below or upload on the form, then tap Value from form or ask me directly.
sell.aiChatPlaceholder: Ask about condition, brand, price range…
sell.aiChatHint: Photos are shared with the listing form (max 6; AI uses up to 3). A clear description plus photos works best.
sell.aiChatNeedContent: Please enter a description, a question, or attach at least one photo before valuing.
sell.aiChatNeedDescription: Please enter an item description before valuing.
sell.aiChatValueFromForm: Please value this item using the form details and photos.
sell.aiChatValueFromPhotos: Please value this item from the attached photos.
sell.aiChatRateLimited: Gemini is rate-limited. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
sell.aiChatError: Could not get an AI valuation right now.

adminContracts.pageSubtitle: All signed electronic contracts (PDF) on the platform: seller and listing agreements.

adminUsers.pageSubtitle: Search and manage buyer, seller, staff and admin accounts.
adminUsers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone, ID number...

adminWalletLedger.pageSubtitle: Track system-wide balance changes, deposits and withdrawal requests.
adminWalletLedger.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, reference code...
adminWalletLedger.ledgerSubtitle: View all transactions affecting wallet balances system-wide. Filter by date or User ID.

adminSalesHistory.pageSubtitle: Successfully paid auction sessions across the platform.

adminDisputes.pageSubtitle: Handle complaints between buyers, sellers and the platform.
adminDisputes.section1Desc: Receive and classify disputes from users.
adminDisputes.section2Desc: Review photos, messages, bid history and payment status.
adminDisputes.section3Desc: Issue refunds, hold deposits, cancel sessions or warn accounts.
adminDisputes.section4Desc: Look up all previously resolved decisions.

adminNotifications.pageSubtitle: Send and control system-wide notifications for users, sellers and staff.
adminNotifications.section1Desc: Send bulk notifications to the entire platform or by role group.
adminNotifications.section2Desc: Set alerts when a session is starting, ending or has new bids.
adminNotifications.section3Desc: Manage in-app or email notification channels.
adminNotifications.section4Desc: Track sent notifications and read status per recipient.

adminAuditLogs.pageSubtitle: Track important system actions for audit purposes.
adminAuditLogs.section1Desc: Record logins, logouts, account locks and failed authentications.
adminAuditLogs.section2Desc: Track category, permission, policy and sensitive data changes.
adminAuditLogs.section3Desc: Log bids, deposits, refunds, session ends and winner handling.
adminAuditLogs.section4Desc: Monitor SePay webhooks, top-up status and reconciliation errors.

adminBiddingRules.pageSubtitle: Manage participation rules, bid increments and deposit requirements.
adminBiddingRules.section1Desc: Set minimum price increases by product group or price range.
adminBiddingRules.section2Desc: Control mandatory deposit ratio before users can join auctions.
adminBiddingRules.section3Desc: Configure auto-extension when bids arrive near closing time.
adminBiddingRules.section4Desc: Only allow identity-verified accounts to place bids.

adminFinancialPolicies.pageSubtitle: Manage platform fees, tax, deposits, refunds and payment rules.
adminFinancialPolicies.section1Desc: Set service fees on winning auction transactions.
adminFinancialPolicies.section2Desc: Manage tax applied when listing products or closing auctions.
adminFinancialPolicies.section3Desc: Rules for refunding deposits for non-winners or cancelled sessions.
adminFinancialPolicies.section4Desc: Set withdrawal limits, processing time and review rules.
